entries.title: Structured outputs cookbook examples updated
entries.body: The cookbook now recommends response_format with json_schema for strongly typed structured outputs and updated examples to avoid legacy json_object-only patterns.

entries.title: Migration examples for tool_choice
entries.body: Examples that previously used function_call were updated to use tool_choice, with notes that function_call remains a deprecated alias for backward compatibility.

entries.title: GPT-4o examples promoted over GPT-4 Turbo
entries.body: Assistant and extraction examples now use gpt-4o and gpt-4o-mini as the default recommendation instead of gpt-4-turbo.
